headline: Piper Sandler Maintains Overweight on Axon Enterprise, Raises Price Target to $724
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst James Fish   maintains Axon Enterprise (NASDAQ:AXON) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $674 to $724.
